Hearing Re: Selection Of Discovery Referee

The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required" This matter was the first motion called at today's hearing. No parties were present at that time. Counsel was present on ZOOM at the end of today's calendar. Court states to counsel that the stipulation and order received by the Court is fine with one exception. A provision in the stipulation that indicates that the discovery referee will file reports, including findings and recommendations, and that the parties may object to the report, but there is not a provision in in the stipulation for getting the objections before the Court. Court states that language will be added to the proposed order which indicates that if objections are filed, a hearing must be noticed before the Court for the Court to actually rule on the objections to the report and recommendation by the referee.
